title: Fake Internship Message
scenario: You receive a message about an internship. It asks you to click a form link and enter your login credentials to confirm your application.

answers.A: Enter my login details to confirm right away.
answers.C: Check the offer through official university career channels.
answers.D: Ignore it and report the message to the university/security team.

explanation: Login/credential requests are a common scam pattern. Verify using official university channels and report suspicious messages.
proTip: Never share credentials in response to unsolicited messages—use official portals.
